description: A dental bridge is a fixed non-removable dental appliance used to replace one or more missing teeth by attaching artificial teeth to neighboring natural teeth.
main_benefits: Upgrade from removable partial denture to permanent solution
treatment_process: Preparation of anchoring teeth by removing part of enamel
durability: Highly durable and long-lasting with proper care, though replacement or re-cementing may be needed over time
notes: Traditional bridges are commonly made of porcelain fused to metal and supported by crowns placed on anchoring teeth.
